# Enforce Tier Firewall

## Objective
To actively strip, abstract, and route sensitive data strictly according to the 3-Tier Confidentiality Model.

1. Audit incoming User A payload strings for PII, specific traumatic trigger phrases, and highly aggressive emotional affect.
2. Abstract to Tier 2 (e.g., "User A expresses deep abandonment feelings").
3. Finalize into Tier 3 questions/prompts when deciding what User B sees (e.g., "Your partner is requesting more reliability right now; how can we approach this together?").


## Pipeline Parallelization + Cultural Intelligence - EvoSkill Patch v1.1

- Orchestrator and Profiler MUST run in parallel (Promise.all)
- Phase agent MUST be invoked when routed before Communication Coach
- Assess Collectivist vs Individualist conflict framework before applying interventions
- Socratic Method may pathologize indirect communication in high-context cultures
